field.label: Ultima Rec.
field.expression: (SELECT datediff(fecrec, fecreq) FROM OCPRECIB WHERE artcod = STK_ARTICULOS.id_stkarticulo ORDER BY id_recepcion DESC LIMIT 1)

field.label: Ultimo Mes
field.expression: (SELECT round(avg(ifnull(datediff(fecrec, fecreq),0)),1) FROM OCPRECIB WHERE artcod = STK_ARTICULOS.id_stkarticulo and fecrec <= LAST_DAY(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) and fecrec >= DATE_ADD(LAST_DAY(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 2 MONTH)), INTERVAL 1 DAY))

field.label: Ultimo Semestre
field.expression: (SELECT round(avg(ifnull(datediff(fecrec, fecreq),0)),1) FROM OCPRECIB WHERE artcod = STK_ARTICULOS.id_stkarticulo and fecrec <= LAST_DAY(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) and fecrec >= DATE_ADD(LAST_DAY(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 MONTH)), INTERVAL 1 DAY))

field.label: Menor Retraso
field.expression: (SELECT round(MIN(ifnull(datediff(fecrec, fecreq),0)),1) FROM OCPRECIB WHERE artcod = STK_ARTICULOS.id_stkarticulo and fecrec <= LAST_DAY(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) and fecrec >= DATE_ADD(LAST_DAY(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 MONTH)), INTERVAL 1 DAY))

field.label: Mayor Retraso
field.expression: (SELECT round(MAX(ifnull(datediff(fecrec, fecreq),0)),1) FROM OCPRECIB WHERE artcod = STK_ARTICULOS.id_stkarticulo and fecrec <= LAST_DAY(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) and fecrec >= DATE_ADD(LAST_DAY(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 MONTH)), INTERVAL 1 DAY))
